name: Matchmania Donate
detailed_description:
An exciting 3Match game where the player faces new challenges with each level in the form of bizarre forms of the playing field that limit your moves, and the level tasks change randomly, forcing the player to think a few steps ahead and choose the right positions.

Matchmania Donate is a 3 match game where the player collects collections of tiles, in complex game levels, with conditions and difficulties that do not allow the player to relax and keep in suspense until the end of the game round.

Control:

Left Mouse Button - Taking Food

Game Features:

  • Visual style

  • Game Mechanics

  • Complexity
